mapper.insert: insert into blog (user_id, shop_id, likes, title, content, images, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{shopId}, #{likes}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select b.*, u.name as userName, u.image as userImage, s.name as shopName from blog b, user u, shop s where b.user_id = u.id and b.shop_id = s.id order by b.create_time desc
